is one of the 38 [municipalities of Coahuila](/wiki/Municipalities_of_Coahuila "Municipalities of Coahuila"), in north-eastern [Mexico](/wiki/Mexico "Mexico"). The municipal seat lies at [Monclova](/wiki/Monclova "Monclova"). The [municipality](/wiki/Municipality "Municipality") covers an area of 1480 km2.

["Monclova"](http://www.elocal.gob.mx/work/templates/enciclo/coahuila/mpios/05018a.htm). *Enciclopedia de los Municipios de México*. [Instituto Nacional para el Federalismo y el Desarrollo Municipal](/wiki/Instituto_Nacional_para_el_Federalismo_y_el_Desarrollo_Municipal "Instituto Nacional para el Federalismo y el Desarrollo Municipal"). Retrieved November 8, 2008.[*[permanent dead link](/wiki/Wikipedia:Link_rot "Wikipedia:Link rot")*]

**Monclova** is one of the 38 [municipalities of Coahuila](/wiki/Municipalities_of_Coahuila "Municipalities of Coahuila"), in north-eastern [Mexico](/wiki/Mexico "Mexico"). The municipal seat lies at [Monclova](/wiki/Monclova "Monclova"). The [municipality](/wiki/Municipality "Municipality") covers an area of 1480 km2.

As of 2020, according to [INEGI](/wiki/National_Institute_of_Statistics_and_Geography "National Institute of Statistics and Geography"), the municipality had a total population of 237,951.[[1]](#cite_note-1)
